cards.front: Definition of (8 hours) in the context of optimization
cards.back: A common assumption in optimization problems, where the optimal solution is found within 8 hours of the initial problem formulation
A heuristic to ensure that the optimal solution is found before the problem becomes computationally intractable or too complex to solve

cards.front: Use of (8 hours) in linear programming
cards.back: A common assumption to bound the number of iterations required to find the optimal solution in linear programming problems

cards.front: Common goal of (8 hours) in optimization
cards.back: To find a feasible and optimal solution within a reasonable amount of time, usually 8 hours

cards.front: Assumption of (8 hours) in optimization problems
